title: Deterministic Networking (DetNet) Data Plane: MPLS
abstract: This document specifies the Deterministic Networking (DetNet) data plane when operating over an MPLS Packet Switched Network.  It leverages existing pseudowire (PW) encapsulations and MPLS Traffic Engineering (MPLS-TE) encapsulations and mechanisms.  This document builds on the DetNet architecture and data plane framework.
